name: Multi-Service Deployment
description: Coordinated deployment of multiple services with versioning, security, and git complexity
task: Deploy 10+ microservices across environments: versioning strategy per service, quality gates, security scanning, dependency checks, architectural alignment, coordinated git workflows. Handle failures and rollbacks gracefully.

coding_challenge.description: Write a deployment orchestrator for multiple services with consistent versioning, quality gates, security scanning, architecture decisions, and git workflows. Return deployment plan with dependencies.
